message.content:
Subject: Formal Complaint: Delayed and Damaged Delivery – Order #[Order Number]

Dear [Customer Service Manager Name or "Customer Support Team"],

I am writing to formally lodge a complaint regarding my recent order, #[Order Number], placed on [Date of Order]. The package was expected to arrive by [Expected Delivery Date], but it was not delivered until [Actual Delivery Date], resulting in a delay of two weeks. Furthermore, upon opening the package, I discovered that the contents were significantly damaged.

The delay in delivery has caused considerable inconvenience, as I was relying on the timely arrival of these items for [briefly explain reason, e.g., a specific event, business use, or personal need]. The lack of proactive communication regarding the delay further compounded the frustration, as I had to repeatedly check the tracking status without receiving any updates from your team.

More concerning is the condition of the package upon arrival. The outer packaging was [describe damage, e.g., crushed, torn, water-stained], and upon inspection, I found that [describe specific damage to items, e.g., the screen of the device was cracked, the clothing was stained, the box was broken]. I have attached photographs of both the damaged packaging and the affected items for your reference.

Given these circumstances, I request the following resolution:
1. A full refund for the damaged items, or
2. Immediate replacement of the items with expedited shipping at no additional cost, along with a partial refund or credit for the inconvenience caused by the delay.

I have been a loyal customer of [Company Name] for [duration, if applicable], and I have always appreciated the quality of your products and service. However, this experience has been deeply disappointing and does not reflect the standards I expect from your company.

I kindly request a response within [number, e.g., 5] business days outlining the
